name: Crayon Competitive Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered competitive and market intelligence platform with REST API — tracking competitor digital footprints across millions of sources, curating intelligence feeds, enabling win/loss analysis, and delivering battlecards and alerts to sales and product teams.
use_cases: Querying curated competitor intelligence cards for sales enablement tool integration
Pulling win/loss analysis data for revenue operations reporting via API
Streaming competitor change alerts to Slack or incident management channels
Integrating Crayon competitive content into LMS or onboarding workflows
Building custom competitive dashboards from Crayon intelligence feed data
not_for: Primary qualitative market research and customer interviews
SEO competitive analysis (use SEMrush or Ahrefs for that)
Startups without formal competitive intelligence program or budget
best_when: A B2B company with dedicated competitive intelligence needs to track many competitors across web, social, review sites, and job boards, with automatic curation and sales team delivery.
avoid_when: You have 1-3 competitors and can track them manually, or you're a B2C company without enterprise sales motion.

auth.notes: API key from Crayon settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for intelligence alerts. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. API access may require plan upgrade.

pricing.paid_tiers: Professional and Enterprise plans; contact sales
pricing.notes: Boston-based company. Founded 2014. Raised $74M. Tracks 100M+ sources automatically. AI curation reduces noise. Integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Chorus, Gong. Strong in B2B SaaS competitive intelligence space.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for intelligence feed, cards, companies, and win/loss. Bearer token auth. Good developer documentation relative to competitors. Intelligence data includes URLs, snippets, and category tags. Competitor company setup required before querying.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Intelligence item reads idempotent. Battlecard reads idempotent. Win/loss records idempotent by opportunity ID. Competitor tracking idempotent by domain.
known_agent_gotchas: Competitors must be configured in Crayon before API data is available
Intelligence feed contains noise — curated vs uncurated distinction important
Win/loss data requires CRM connection for deal-level analysis
Intelligence items include web snapshots — large payloads possible
Rate limits not clearly documented — implement conservative retry logic

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token with org-level scope. Competitive intelligence includes scraped public data — verify compliance with scraped site ToS for specific use cases.
